section.heading: Art. 120a. Mails: deposit of obscene matter

content.p: Any person subject to this chapter who, wrongfully and knowingly, deposits obscene matter for mailing and delivery shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–328, div. E, title LX, § 5431, Dec. 23, 2016, 130 Stat. 2951.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 920a was renumbered section 930 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on Jan. 1, 2019, as designated by the President, with implementing regulations and provisions relating to applicability to various situations, see section 5542 of Pub. L. 114–328 and Ex. Ord. No. 13825, set out as notes under section 801 of this title.
